title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers to automate daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. The tool supports complex workflow automation and is available in Claude Pro and Max subscription tiers.
